name: Trip through mementos
description:
This is alt images (couldn't find any good ones... Its so hard to find pictures of mementos that arent ingame images

(PS, If you think one of the below images would be better, lmk and i will change bot image to that.)

Tags: Ann takamaki, Panther, Morgana, Mona, Ryuji Sakamoto, Skull, Yusuke Kitagawa, Fox, Makoto Niijima, Queen, Futaba Sakura, Oracle, Haru Okumura, Noir, Persona, Persona 5, Persona 5 Royal, Persona 5 Royale, Phantom thieves, steal your heart (not literally), Shibuya, Atlas, Metaverse, Mementos, Memento's, Morgana Car

In this, i included akechi and Sumire, so you can truly chat with all the phantom thieves. but i didnt put your pov as joker. So that you could also chat with him if you wished. Also left it open ended why you're there, what your role is, etc.
creator: Badtime
